title: alstonia pacifica
intro: Alstonia pacifica, also known as the Pacific Milkwood or White Milkwood, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands, specifically in Fiji, Samoa, and Tonga. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Alstonia pacifica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Alstonia pacifica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
